name: Grand Opening Week
description: The mall celebrates its grand reopening with balloons, banners, and a flood of curious shoppers eager to see what's new.
announcement_text: Grand Opening Week starts tomorrow! The mall is buzzing with anticipation.
active_text: Grand Opening Week! Crowds are pouring in to check out the stores.

name: Sports Season Kickoff
description: The local league kicks off its new season and fans are desperate for jerseys, cards, and memorabilia to show their loyalty.
announcement_text: Sports Season Kickoff tomorrow! Fans will be hunting for memorabilia.
active_text: Sports Season Kickoff! The memorabilia crowd is out in full force.

name: Collectors Convention Weekend
description: The annual MallCon descends upon the food court parking lot, drawing hordes of card traders and retro game hunters.
announcement_text: MallCon starts tomorrow! Collectors are converging on the mall.
active_text: MallCon is here! Collectors and traders are everywhere.

name: Back to School Rush
description: Summer's over and parents are dragging kids through the mall for last-minute school supplies, gadgets, and bribes.
announcement_text: Back to School Rush starts tomorrow! Families incoming.
active_text: Back to School Rush! Parents and students are stocking up.

name: Holiday Shopping Season
description: The big one. Tinsel in the rafters, carols on the speakers, and shoppers with gift lists longer than their patience.
announcement_text: Holiday Shopping Season starts tomorrow! Prepare for the rush.
active_text: Holiday Shopping Season! The mall is packed wall to wall.

name: Post-Holiday Slump
description: The decorations are down, the gift cards are spent, and everyone's broke. The mall echoes with emptiness.
announcement_text: Post-Holiday Slump expected tomorrow. Brace for low traffic.
active_text: Post-Holiday Slump. The mall feels like a ghost town.

name: Retro Revival Week
description: A wave of 90s nostalgia sweeps through town. Everyone suddenly wants the stuff they threw away a decade ago.
announcement_text: Retro Revival Week starts tomorrow! Nostalgia is in the air.
active_text: Retro Revival Week! Everyone wants a piece of the past.

name: Summer Clearance
description: Mid-year clearance draws deal-seekers but they're only buying if it's cheap. Very cheap.
announcement_text: Summer Clearance starts tomorrow! Bargain hunters incoming.
active_text: Summer Clearance! Shoppers are hunting for deals on everything.
